title: cremanthodium ellisii var. ellisii
intro: Cremanthodium ellisii var. ellisii is a plant species, also known as the Tibetan daisy, which belongs to the sunflower family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cremanthodium ellisii var. ellisii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Cremanthodium ellisii var. ellisii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
